company_name: Corpus Christi Swimming Pools And Spas
tagline: #1 Pool Cleaning & Repair in Corpus Christi

hero.headline:
Crystal Clear Pools Within
One Hour
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be the best part of your home, not another chore on your list. Corpus Christi Swimming Pools & Spas handles every detail from weekly cleaning to complex repairs so you can skip the hassle and just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Coastal Texas
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance with chemicals included to emergency repairs with a 1-hour response, we keep your pool and spa running perfectly so you never miss a swim day.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Complete weekly care including skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and equipment checks. All chemicals are included so you never have to buy a thing.

cards.title: Pool & Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing. Most issues resolved same-visit with our 1-hour response time guarantee.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp green? We restore it to crystal-clear, swim-ready condition fast. Emergency same-day response available for urgent cases.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Repairs
cards.description: Specialized repair services for hot tubs and spas covering heating, circulation, jets, and electrical issues. We get your relaxation spot back online quickly.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint leaks in plumbing, shells, and equipment before they cause expensive damage to your property.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Upgrades
cards.description: Transform your aging pool with new finishes, smart automation from Hayward and Pentair, LED lighting, and modern equipment upgrades.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Fill out our online form for a free estimate and an automatic 10% discount. We respond within one hour and schedule a convenient time to inspect your pool.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.description: Our Hayward and Pentair certified technicians arrive on time, every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and repairs are all covered with zero surprises.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right at no charge. That is our guarantee.

about.label: Why Corpus Christi Trusts Us
about.headline: 8 Years of Keeping Coastal Texas Pools Perfect
about.description: Founded in 2018, Corpus Christi Swimming Pools & Spas was built to deliver pool care that actually lives up to its promises. Our team handles everything from weekly maintenance to full renovations across a 2-hour radius for repairs and a 15-mile radius for weekly cleaning. We serve Corpus Christi, Padre Island, Port Aransas, and surrounding communities with the same dedication and attention to detail that earned us a 4.8-star rating from over 106 homeowners.

features.title: 1-Hour Response Time Guarantee
features.description: When your pool has a problem, waiting days is not an option. We guarantee a response within 60 minutes so issues get resolved before they get expensive.

features.title: All Chemicals Included
features.description: No hidden costs and no trips to the pool store. Every weekly service includes all the chemicals your pool needs to stay balanced and swim-ready.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Promise
features.description: Not happy with any visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. We also offer weekend availability for urgent service when you need us most.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Chemicals Included.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service plan that fits your pool. Get 10% off when you request your estimate online. No contracts, cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Swim-Ready" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at absolutely no charge. We back every job with a 1-hour response time and weekend availability because your pool does not take days off and neither do we. That is the Corpus Christi Swimming Pools & Spas promise.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or urgent repairs, we guarantee a 1-hour response time. Call us or fill out the online form and we will get back to you fast.

faqs.question: Are chemicals included with weekly service?
faqs.answer: Yes, all chemicals are included with every weekly service plan. You never need to buy, store, or handle pool chemicals yourself. We bring everything needed to keep your water perfectly balanced.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Corpus Christi?
faqs.answer: We cover a 15-mile radius for weekly cleaning services including Corpus Christi, Padre Island, and Calallen. For repairs, we service a 2-hour radius including Port Aransas, Aransas Pass, Rockport, and Odem.

faqs.question: Do you work on hot tubs and spas too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in hot tub and spa repairs including heating issues, circulation problems, jet replacements, and electrical diagnostics. We service all major brands.

faqs.question: What if I just need a one-time cleaning?
faqs.answer: We offer single-visit deep cleaning services for pools that need a thorough cleanup without a weekly commitment. This includes skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and full chemical balancing. Request your free estimate online for a 10% discount.

testimonials.name: Visanne G.
testimonials.text: Great service! Luis did an amazing job. He is the definition of great customer service and cleanliness while working. Our pool has never looked better and we could not be happier with the results.

testimonials.name: Orlando A.
testimonials.text: Salo was wonderful. He greeted me with a smile that showed real passion and professionalism. The entire team at Corpus Christi Swimming Pools makes you feel like a valued customer every single visit.

testimonials.name: Joe O.
testimonials.text: Denali was great. Super friendly and knowledgeable. They diagnosed our pump issue fast and had it fixed the same day. Highly recommend for anyone needing reliable pool repairs in the Corpus Christi area.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Perfect?
contact.subtitle: Get a free estimate and 10% off when you submit online. We respond within 1 hour, no contracts, no commitments — just honest pool care from a team Corpus Christi trusts.
